commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Trust link to the press page footer and adds the standard footer navigation block and page-local footer styles to the privacy page.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows the press footer omits Trust and the privacy page closes without footer navigation; the PR body also provides generated-output checks after the patch.
commands.review_followup: No automated code repair is needed; maintainer handling is only needed for the Vercel deployment authorization/status and the normal merge decision.

target.title: fix(nav): add missing Trust link to press footer, add footer to privacy page
target.body:
## Summary

Two footer navigation inconsistencies fixed:

1. **Press page**: footer nav had 5 links but was missing the Trust link that every other page includes
2. **Privacy page**: had no footer navigation at all; users reaching `/privacy` from app stores or emails had no way to discover blog, trust, showcase, or other pages without going home first

## Changes

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `src/pages/press.astro` | Add Trust link after Integrations in footer nav |
| `src/pages/privacy.astro` | Add full footer nav matching the standard pattern |

## Verification

- **Behavior addressed**: inconsistent footer navigation across pages; press page missing Trust link, privacy page missing entire footer nav
- **Real environment tested**: local Astro SSG build (`npx astro build`, Node 22)
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
  ```
  npx astro build
  # Before fix (parent commit):
  grep -o 'href="[^"]*trust[^"]*"' dist/press/index.html  # (no output - Trust link missing)
  grep -c footer-nav dist/privacy/index.html               # 0

  # After fix:
  grep -o 'href="[^"]*trust[^"]*"' dist/press/index.html  # href="https://trust.openclaw.ai/"
  grep -c footer-nav dist/privacy/index.html               # 1
  ```
- **Evidence after fix**:
  - Press page footer now includes `href="https://trust.openclaw.ai/"`
  - Privacy page now has `footer-nav` with 7 links: `/`, `/blog`, `/showcase`, `/press`, `/shoutouts`, `/integrations`, `https://trust.openclaw.ai/`
  - Trust link consistency across all pages after fix:
    ```
    index:        1 trust link
    blog:         1 trust link
    integrations: 1 trust link
    press:        1 trust link  (was 0)
    privacy:      1 trust link  (was 0)
    shoutouts:    1 trust link
    showcase:     1 trust link
    ```
- **Observed result after fix**: all public pages have consistent footer navigation with Trust link
- **What was not tested**: production Vercel deployment, visual rendering across screen sizes
